title: Hi-C Assembly Pipeline for Scapharca broughtonii Genome
author: Chang-Ming CM Bai
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.z8cf9sw

steps.title: Run BWA (v0
steps.instruction: Run BWA (v0.7.10-r789) to align the Hi-C reads to the initially assembled S. broughtonii genome, and found the Hi-C reads mapped to the assembled genome. bwa index -a bwtsw fasta bwa aln -M 3 -O 11 -E 4 -t 2 fq1 bwa aln -M 3 -O 11 -E 4 -t 2 fq2

steps.title: Filter the mapped Hi-C reads obtalined...
steps.instruction: Filter the mapped Hi-C reads obtalined in the step 1 using HiC-Pro (v. 2.10.0). mapped_2hic_fragments.py -v -S -s 100 -l 1000 -a -f -r -o

steps.title: Extract valid interaction pair reads according the HiC-Pro results
steps.instruction: Extract valid interaction pair reads according the HiC-Pro results.

steps.title: Break the initial assembly to 300...
steps.instruction: Break the initial assembly to 300 bp, and then run LACHESIS (v2e27abb) for assembling based on Hi-C data.
